mapper.sql: A.ADBK_ID AS adbkId, A.ADBK_NM AS adbkNm, A.OTHBC_SCOPE AS othbcScope, A.USE_AT AS useAt, A.WRTER_ID AS wrterId, A.TRGET_ORGNZT_ID AS trgetOrgnztId, (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.WRTER_ID) AS frstRegisterNm, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
AND A.USE_AT = 'Y' AND A.ADBK_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}),'%') AND A.WRTER_ID LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}),'%')
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_ADBK_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.ADBK_NM LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ADBK_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_ADBK_MANAGE A WHERE A.ADBK_ID = #{adbkId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ADBK_MANAGE (ADBK_ID, ADBK_NM, OTHBC_SCOPE, USE_AT, WRTER_ID, TRGET_ORGNZT_ID, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{adbkId}, #{adbkNm}, #{othbcScope}, 'Y', #{wrterId}, #{trgetOrgnztId}, #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ADBK_MANAGE SET ADBK_NM = #{adbkNm}, OTHBC_SCOPE = #{othbcScope}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ADBK_ID = #{adbkId}
UPDATE TB_ADBK_MANAGE SET USE_AT = 'N' WHERE ADBK_ID = #{adbkId}
mapper.select: SELECT NCRD_ID AS ncrdId, NM AS adbkNm FROM TB_NCRD WHERE 1=0
